name: Todo App
description: A classic task manager where users can add, complete, edit, and delete todos, with state persisted in the browser.
learningOutcomes: Manage component state and lists
Handle form input and events
Persist data with the browser local storage API

name: Personal Portfolio
description: A responsive single-page portfolio showcasing your bio, projects, and contact links, ready to deploy to a static host.
learningOutcomes: Build a responsive layout with Flexbox and Grid
Structure a multi-section landing page
Deploy a static site to a free hosting provider

name: Weather Widget
description: A small app that fetches the current weather for a city from a public API and renders it with simple loading and error states.
learningOutcomes: Call a third-party REST API from the browser
Handle loading and error UI states
Render data returned from an asynchronous request

name: Markdown Previewer
description: A split-pane editor that converts Markdown text to live HTML preview as the user types.
learningOutcomes: Wire controlled inputs to derived state
Integrate a third-party parsing library
Safely render generated HTML

name: Tip Calculator
description: An interactive calculator that splits a bill, applies a tip percentage, and shows per-person totals.
learningOutcomes: Perform input validation on numeric fields
Compute and format currency values
Update the UI reactively from user input

name: REST API with Auth
description: A backend REST API with user registration, JWT authentication, protected routes, and a relational database.
learningOutcomes: Design RESTful routes and status codes
Implement password hashing and JWT auth
Protect routes with middleware and validate requests

name: Weather Dashboard
description: A multi-city weather dashboard with search, saved locations, charts of forecast data, and client-side caching.
learningOutcomes: Manage server state and caching with React Query
Compose reusable data-visualization components
Persist user preferences across sessions

name: Blog with CMS
description: A full-stack blog with Markdown posts, an admin dashboard for authoring, and server-side rendered public pages.
learningOutcomes: Build CRUD flows backed by a database
Render content server-side for SEO
Separate public and authenticated admin areas

name: Expense Tracker
description: A personal finance app to log income and expenses, categorize transactions, and visualize monthly spending trends.
learningOutcomes: Model and aggregate transactional data
Build summary charts from raw records
Connect a React frontend to a Node backend

name: Mobile Fitness Tracker
description: A cross-platform mobile app that logs workouts, tracks streaks, and stores history with offline support.
learningOutcomes: Build navigable multi-screen mobile UIs
Persist data offline on a device
Handle platform differences across iOS and Android

name: Real-time Chat App
description: A real-time messaging app with rooms, presence indicators, typing status, and message history over WebSockets.
learningOutcomes: Implement bidirectional real-time communication
Manage presence and ephemeral state with Redis
Reconcile live updates with persisted history

name: E-commerce Platform
description: A storefront with product catalog, cart, checkout, payment integration, and an order-management admin panel.
learningOutcomes: Integrate a payment provider and handle webhooks
Model carts, orders, and inventory
Build a secure checkout flow end to end

name: ML Image Classifier
description: An image classification service that trains a convolutional model, serves predictions via an API, and exposes a web upload UI.
learningOutcomes: Train and evaluate a CNN on an image dataset
Serve a model behind a prediction API
Package an ML service with Docker

name: CI/CD Pipeline & Infrastructure
description: An automated pipeline that builds, tests, containerizes, and deploys an application to the cloud with infrastructure as code.
learningOutcomes: Automate build, test, and deploy stages
Provision cloud infrastructure with Terraform
Containerize and orchestrate a deployment

name: Blockchain Voting DApp
description: A decentralized voting application with smart contracts, a wallet-connected frontend, and on-chain result tallying.
learningOutcomes: Write and test Ethereum smart contracts
Connect a frontend to a wallet and contract
Reason about gas, security, and on-chain state

name: Multi-tenant SaaS
description: A production SaaS with organization-based multi-tenancy, role-based access control, subscription billing, and audit logging.
learningOutcomes: Design tenant isolation and RBAC at scale
Implement subscription billing and entitlements
Add observability, audit trails, and rate limiting

name: Video Streaming Service
description: A scalable video platform with upload, transcoding, adaptive bitrate streaming, a CDN, and a recommendation feed.
learningOutcomes: Build a transcoding and adaptive-streaming pipeline
Serve media at scale through a CDN
Design for high throughput and low latency

name: Observability Platform
description: A monitoring system that ingests metrics and logs, runs alerting rules, and renders dashboards for distributed services.
learningOutcomes: Ingest and store high-volume time-series data
Implement alerting and anomaly detection
Operate a system across distributed services

name: AI RAG Assistant
description: A production retrieval-augmented generation assistant with document ingestion, a vector store, streaming responses, and evaluation.
learningOutcomes: Build an ingestion and embedding pipeline
Implement retrieval-augmented generation with citations
Evaluate and monitor LLM output quality

name: Secure Banking API
description: A hardened financial API with strong authentication, encryption, transaction integrity, fraud checks, and compliance logging.
learningOutcomes: Apply defense-in-depth and secure coding practices
Guarantee transactional integrity and idempotency
Implement audit logging and compliance controls
